name: research-plugin
description: Lean Codex research-state workflow with project-local MCP context, resources, reviews, and cloud SSH sandboxes.

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped claims, experiments, resources, reviews, and cloud sandboxes
interface.longDescription: A lean research-state plug-in where Codex operates through skills and a project-local MCP proxy. The backend service (a single local server in local mode, or a hosted control plane with a proxy-local data plane in split mode) controls durable memory, permissioned mutations, repo-file resources, workflow state, adversarial review records, and cloud sandbox provisioning. Agents use project.current for folder context, copy sandbox outputs back via storage tools or client-side rsync, and use resource.register for repo artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Plugin. Start with project.current, then workflow.status_and_next.
Use Research Plugin to run this experiment in a sandbox and copy retained outputs back (storage tools or client-side rsync) before registering results.
Use Research Plugin to sync resources, review the experiment, and update claims.
